grace_period.source_quote: Grace Period for payment of the premium shall be thirty days

free_look_period.source_quote: free look period of thirty days from date of receipt of the policy document

initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: First 30 days waiting period (Excl 03) a) Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within thirty (30) days from the first policy commencement date shall be excluded

pre_existing_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: Pre-Existing Diseases (Excl 01) a) Expenses related to the treatment of a Pre-Existing Disease (PED) and its direct complications shall be excluded until the expiry of thirty six (36) months of continuous coverage

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 90 days/ one year/ two year/ four years (as specified against specific disease/ procedure)

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Maternity Cover (1 delivery/ termination, Waiting Period 2 years) – up to INR 30,000 (Basic SI 3L), INR

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: Medical Expenses incurred up to forty five (45) days immediately before the Insured Person is hospitalised

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: up to sixty (60) days immediately after the Insured Person is discharge

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (National Parivar Mediclaim covers 140+ day care procedures)

network_hospital_count.source_note: 5322 Network Hospitals ('Why Choose NICL' section, scraped 2026-05-15)

room_rent_capped_at_pct_of_si.source_quote: Room Rent - Upto INR 5,000 per day for Basic SI 3L, 5L and upto INR 10,000 per day for Basic SI 10L ICU Charges - Upto INR 10,000 per day for Basic SI 3L, 5L and upto INR 20,000 per day for Basic SI 10L Proportionate Deduction shall apply if opted for higher Room Rent

ayush_coverage.source_quote: 2.7 AYUSH Treatment refers to the medical and/ or Hospitalisation treatments given Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy, Unani, Sidha and Homeopathy systems.

maternity_coverage.source_quote: 3.1.7 Maternity The Company shall indemnify Maternity Expenses as described below for any female Insured Person, and also Pre-Natal and Post-Natal Hospitalisation expenses per delivery, including expenses for necessary vaccination for New Born Baby

newborn_coverage.source_quote: New Born Baby shall be automatically covered from birth under the Sum Insured available to the mother during the corresponding Policy Period, for up to 3 months of age.

restoration_benefit.source_quote: Reinstatement of Basic Sum Insured (available to Basic Sum Insured of ₹ 5L and above) For Policies with Basic Sum Insured of ₹ 5 lacs and above, in the event of available Sum Insured being exhausted anytime during the Policy Year on account of Hospitalisation claim(s)

domiciliary_treatment.source_quote: 5.23. Domiciliary Hospitalization & Out Patient Department (OPD) treatment Any expenses incurred on Domiciliary Hospitalization and OPD treatment

critical_illness_cover.source_quote: 3.3.2. Double SI for 11 Critical Illnesses - Optional 2

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless Facility can be availed, if TPA service is opted

no_claim_bonus_cap_pct.source_quote: shall not exceed 50% of the Basic Sum Insured

tat_cashless_authorization_hours.source_quote: pre-authorization letter within an hour to the Hospital after verification

room_rent_capping.source_quote: Room Rent - Upto INR 5,000 per day for Basic SI 3L, 5L and upto INR 10,000 per day for Basic SI 10L ICU Charges - Upto INR 10,000 per day for Basic SI 3L, 5L and upto INR 20,000 per day for Basic SI 10L Proportionate Deduction shall apply if opted for higher Room Rent

no_claim_bonus_pct.source_quote: increase by 5% of Basic SI in respect of each claim free
